content.query:
--Creating an external table for a parquet file in the data lake

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [ECM].[aaedicustomer] (
	[row_id] int,
	[TradingPartnerID] nvarchar(4000),
	[CUSTOMER_ID] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_850] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_860] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_NEEDS_INVOICE] nvarchar(4000),
	[Name] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_UPC] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_GTIN] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_BUYER_SKU] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_VENDOR_ITEM_NO] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_BUYER_CAT_NO] nvarchar(4000),
	[VALUE_ADD_CUST] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_PRICE] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SKU] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_UCC] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SCC_14] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_SHIP_LABEL] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_MP_LABEL] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_STORE_ID] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_WHSE] nvarchar(4000),
	[VA_OTHER] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_CONSOL_SHIPTO] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810_CONSOL] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_810_CONSOL_JIT] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_856_CONSOL_JIT] nvarchar(4000),
	[EDI_812] nvarchar(4000),
	[VISUAL_EDI] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'ECVisualVMFG/aa_edi_customer.parquet',
	DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseParquetFormat]
	)

-- Creating a view over a file in the data lake.

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [ECM_aa_edi_customer] AS
    SELECT *
    FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/ECVisualVMFG/aa_edi_customer.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
